problem_solution.name: Problem → Solution (Direct Response)
problem_solution.goal: Stop the scroll, trigger emotion, show solution
hook_examples: If you're constantly bloated, watch this.
I didn't realise THIS was causing my low energy.
Nobody talks about this when trying to get healthier…
Your digestion might be broken (here's the fix).
This ONE thing made me lose 5 lbs in a week.
Stop wasting money on supplements…
problem_solution.editing: Fast cuts, B-roll of problem scenario, product reveal, results montage

testimonial.name: Testimonial / Social Proof
hook_examples: Day 3 of using this and here's what I noticed.
I was sceptical at first…
Real review on TrustPilot / Instagram comments
Unboxing + first reaction
POV: You finally try the cleanse that actually works
testimonial.voiceover: Authentic, real customer voice or on-screen text
testimonial.editing: Genuine reactions, unboxing footage, product shots

benefits_breakdown.name: Benefits Breakdown
hook_examples: Here's why this actually works.
3 reasons this is better than store-bought.
What happens when you take this for 5 days.
Cold-pressed vs regular juice (the difference is crazy).
Why your gut needs THIS
benefits_breakdown.editing: Text overlays, ingredient footage, infographics, quick cuts

objection_handler.name: Objection Handling
hook_examples: Will you be hungry?
Is it safe?
Is it worth the price?
Can I still work while doing this?
Won't I miss solid food?
Is it just a scam?
objection_handler.editing: Direct to camera, text overlays, guarantee badge

lifestyle_identity.name: Lifestyle / Identity
hook_examples: POV: You finally take your health seriously.
Morning routine with JUCY cleanse.
Gym → cleanse → productivity.
What I do every Monday for a fresh week.
Wellness prep Sunday with JUCY.

structure.cta: Be part of the wellness club

lifestyle_identity.voiceover: Minimal talking. Atmospheric. Motivational background track.
lifestyle_identity.editing: Cinematic B-roll, gym footage, morning routine, no heavy text
